_comment: Calibration for boxes.py chest-counter. Edit live — reloaded every count_boxes() call.

dots_roi._comment: Band below each matched chest box where pip-dots live.

pip_fill._comment: A pip cell is 'filled' if its MAX brightness (V in HSV, 0-255) >= min_brightness. Max-V per cell so a single bright pixel in a narrow cell registers as filled.

_tuning_notes: match_threshold: lower if chests not found; raise if false positives appear.
scales: the game renders chests ~64px natively at 1x UI scale. Adjust if your window scale differs.
dots_roi.dy_frac: fraction of matched-box HEIGHT to skip below the box before the dot band starts.
dots_roi.h_frac: height of the dot band as fraction of matched-box HEIGHT.
dots_roi.pad_frac: horizontal padding on each side of the dot band (fraction of box WIDTH).
pip_fill.min_brightness: 0-255 HSV-V threshold. Filled pip = bright colored circle; empty = dark hollow.
max_pips: cap on pip count returned (game UI shows at most ~10-20 pips per chest type).
min_pip_cells: minimum number of non-trivial (non-empty) cells to trust a pip row was actually found.
